column1: # Pre-release PROMPT eval — golden set (TAB-separated; '#' lines ignored).
# columns:  question <TAB> must_contain <TAB> must_not_contain <TAB> manifest
#   must_contain / must_not_contain are COMMA-separated literal substrings checked
#   against the generated program (grep -F). This is the STABLE tier: it asserts the
#   model picks the right TOOLS / program SHAPE, which is far less flaky than scoring
#   the numeric answer. Each rule below encodes a privacy_box-system.md HARD RULE or
#   a regression we fixed (the "$224,303 phone bill"):
#     transactions(  — spending/count/total/biggest must use the structured tool
#     money(         — amounts must be formatted with money(), not String(x)
#     manifest(      — vault-structure questions answer from the manifest
#     .alias         — FileInfo has no .alias field (it's .id) → must never appear
#     search(        — wrong for exact transaction aggregates / meta questions
#     $" +           — manual dollar concat = the raw-float formatting bug
#     ask_local      — a meta count must not call the model at all
# question
how much did I pay for my phone bill
how many transactions do I have
what is the total of my transactions
what was my biggest transaction
how many documents are in my vault
